caption: This static graphic promotes the "OPENSTACK" "BARCELONA SUMMIT" with the greeting "WELCOME TO THE". The scene features a blue background with a stylized skyline of a city. A white cable car with a red stripe is suspended from a wire. To the left, a whimsical illustration depicts a blue bird wearing a red cap, standing beside a yellow object with a red "C" logo and two small cans. The image is a repetitive tiling of the same composition, creating a seamless pattern. There is no movement or change in the scene between the frames, as they are identical repetitions of the same promotional artwork.
